title: XSS Impact Demonstration Guide
when_to_use: When demonstrating XSS severity to clients

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Create page defacement attack using Stored XSS to modify visible page content
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for xss impact demonstration guide
steps.expected_output: Recorded demonstration showing unauthorized page content changes

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Develop cookie theft exploit redirecting users to attacker-controlled server
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Captured session cookies proving credential theft capability

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Build phishing form injection that overlays fake login on legitimate page
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Functional phishing form demonstration capturing user credentials

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Create keylogger script injection demonstrating keystroke capture capability
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Proof-of-concept showing captured keystrokes from user input

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Record all demonstrations showing each attack vector in action
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Video recordings of each XSS attack scenario for client presentation

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Document business impact of each attack in non-technical terms
steps.expected_output: Business-focused impact statement explaining real-world consequences

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Prepare comprehensive report with technical PoC and business impact narrative
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Client-ready report combining technical proof-of-concept with executive summary
